title: Imbued Deco
description: Addon to Amethyst Imbuement that adds more decorative blocks based on the materials in the base mod.
body:
![Imbued Deco Main Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6d48bab28a8e96d361ff53c840aec0385526cf1.png) Imbued Deco is an addon mod to [Amethyst Imbuement](modrinth.com/mod/amethyst-imbuement) that adds new decoration blocks based on the materials in the base mod! A new category added to the in-game Glistering Tome will guide you through all the recipes and other details. * Crystallized Light Panes * Crystallized Light Stairs * Crystallized Light Slabs * Cut Steel blocks * More Basic Steel Blocks * Imbued Hopper - tranports an entire stack of items at a time! * Tiny Cauldron - just a little boi * Potions - Potions are now placeable! They keep their colors based on the order placed.

![All the blocks added by Imbued Deco lined up](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c81e99ab327199140483a781f8650c9573ca149.png) [![Bisect Hosting Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/85a7141b-76c9-4f0c-bd04-21f4b0d56c4a.webp "Bisect Hosting Banner")](https://bisecthosting.com/fzzyhmstrs)
